message.content: @startuml skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0 skinparam classFontStyle bold skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5 skinparam classBorderColor #000000 skinparam classArrowColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #C1E1C1 skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #000000 skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic class "FantasticFactory" as FantasticFactory { -_page -_author +FantasticFactory() } class "FantasticBook" as FantasticBook { -_bookCategory -_page -_author +FantasticBook() } class "BookFactory" as BookFactory { +GetBook() } class "Book" as Book { +BookCategory +Page +Author } class "ScienceFictionFactory" as ScienceFictionFactory { -_page -_author +ScienceFictionFactory() } class "ScienceFictionBook" as ScienceFictionBook { -_bookCategory -_page -_author +ScienceFictionBook() } FantasticFactory --|> BookFactory ScienceFictionFactory --|> BookFactory FantasticBook --|> Book ScienceFictionBook --|> Book FantasticFactory ..> FantasticBook ScienceFictionFactory ..> ScienceFictionBook note top of FantasticFactory C end note note top of FantasticBook C end note note top of BookFactory A end note note top of Book A end note note top of ScienceFictionFactory C end note note top of ScienceFictionBook C end note @enduml
